data.content: Implementation review requested changes. 1) Acceptance criteria 1 and 2 are not met at runtime: after switching repositories on /beats, the previous repository rows remain visible instead of clearing immediately and showing the loading placeholder. Reproduced in browser by injecting a 2s delay on /api/beats/query, then using repo-switch shortcuts between foolery and knots; the repo button and URL changed immediately while stale rows such as 'Wire lease agent metadata into knot step records' stayed on screen for at least 500ms. 2) Acceptance criterion 3 is therefore not met either, because the loading indicator is not what remains visible until the new repo finishes rendering. 3) Regression coverage is insufficient: src/lib/__tests__/repo-switch-loading-contract.test.ts only asserts source strings and did not catch the failing runtime behavior.
